title: Lowe's Outlines Next Chapter of Total Home Strategy to Fuel Long-Term Growth

title: Lowe's Sets Goal to Reach Net-Zero Emissions across Scopes 1, 2 and 3 by 2050
text: Company's net-zero roadmap focuses on reducing impact of its value chain, increasing product efficiency and transitioning to renewable energy sources  MOORESVILLE, N.C. , Dec. 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Lowe's today announced its goal to reach net-zero emissions across the company's scope 1, 2 and 3 greenhouse gas emissions by 2050, in accordance with guidelines from the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi), the global body enabling businesses to set emissions reduction targets in line with climate science.
